remaining_tasks.name: Add hasInspiration display to CharacterSheetTab
remaining_tasks.detail: CharacterSheetTab has no renderer for hasInspiration. Add an Inspiration indicator (star icon + 'Inspired' label) to SheetHeader or CombatStatsSection. The DB field exists (character_resources.has_inspiration). Cache invalidation already fires on ['characters','getByCampaignId',id] after awardInspiration.

remaining_tasks.name: Re-verify items 2 and 4 with user
remaining_tasks.detail: Item 2 (NPCs): pipeline code is correct — AI just didn't introduce NPCs in initial test. Try a session that naturally introduces characters. Item 4 (inspiration): needs the display fix above, then re-test by asking the AI to award inspiration.

remaining_tasks.name: Code review gate + phase verification
remaining_tasks.detail: Run /gsd:code-review 06, then spawn verifier agent to create VERIFICATION.md

blockers.description: better-sqlite3 ABI mismatch: compiled for Electron ABI 145 but vitest uses Node ABI 137. All SQLite-backed tests fail with NODE_MODULE_VERSION error.
blockers.workaround: Run 'npm run rebuild:sqlite' before running tests standalone. This is a pre-existing issue documented in .planning/phases/06-quests-npcs-world-state/deferred-items.md. Non-SQLite tests (toolSchemas 28, contextBuilder 33) pass fine.

human_actions_pending.action: Re-verify inspiration (item 4) after the hasInspiration display fix is applied
human_actions_pending.context: awardInspiration pipeline works but CharacterSheetTab doesn't render the flag — user couldn't see the result

human_actions_pending.action: Re-verify NPC tracker (item 2) in a longer session that naturally introduces characters
human_actions_pending.context: Pipeline code is correct; initial test session may not have triggered addNpc

decisions.decision: Hoisted TooltipProvider to screen root in CampaignViewScreen instead of wrapping per-button
decisions.rationale: ChatInputArea's Tooltip was outside all 4 individual providers causing a crash; single root provider is the standard shadcn pattern and covers all children

decisions.decision: tsc --noEmit exits 0 after 06-07 fixed onMutationsApplied payload type and 'args' in tc narrowing in llmProvider.ts
decisions.rationale: 7 pre-existing errors were actually Phase 6 seam bugs; executor agent identified and fixed them

decisions.decision: Pre-existing better-sqlite3 ABI mismatch treated as baseline noise for test gate
decisions.rationale: Same 12 files / 94 tests fail before and after Phase 6 — not introduced by this phase

next_action: Add hasInspiration display to CharacterSheetTab: read src/renderer/src/components/sheet/SheetHeader.tsx or CombatStatsSection.tsx, find where character data is rendered, add an Inspiration indicator (star icon, visible when character.resources.hasInspiration is true)
context_notes: Phase 6 is 6/7 plans committed and merged. Plan 06-07 is at the human-verify checkpoint. Two UAT items remain: inspiration display (code fix needed) and NPC verification (likely just needs a longer test session). Once both pass, update plan 06-07 ROADMAP entry, commit tracking, then run code review and phase verification to close the phase.
